selections.name: Gripping
selections.reason: In superb form with consecutive runner-up finishes over hurdles, including a strong second at Hamilton last start. Steven Pateman takes the ride, which is a massive lead.

selections.name: Embezzler (NZ)
selections.reason: Resumes here for the powerful Symon Wilde yard. Highly capable over the jumps and expected to show sharp improvement back in this discipline.

selections.name: Shogun Express (NZ)
selections.reason: Disappointed last start when failing to finish, but prior flat and hurdle form was highly competitive. Capable of bouncing back strongly.

selections.name: Mash And Gravy
selections.reason: Freshened up since his last run. Has shown enough jumping ability in trials and previous hurdle starts to warrant respect in this field.

danger_horse.name: Embezzler (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: The main threat resuming for Symon Wilde; has excellent technical jumping ability.

selections.name: Ferago
selections.reason: Outstanding hurdle performer who has won his last two starts in dominant fashion. Despite the heavy weight, his class should carry him through.

selections.name: Flashlight (NZ)
selections.reason: Highly progressive type who won his maiden hurdle by a dominant 4 lengths last start. Represents the main danger to the top selection.

selections.name: Split (NZ)
selections.reason: Solid third on the flat last start at Casterton. Possesses a good jumping technique and should be competitive in this grade.

selections.name: Gambu (NZ)
selections.reason: Faded to fourth last start but has previous steeplechase and hurdle form that keeps him in the mix for minor exotic spots.

danger_horse.name: Flashlight (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Highly progressive and coming off an impressive 4-length hurdle victory.

selections.name: Saint Eustace (NZ)
selections.reason: Excellent steeplechaser who was a close second at Casterton last start and won at Warrnambool prior. Steven Pateman riding is a major plus.

selections.name: Nightfall (NZ)
selections.reason: Impressive winner at Te Aroha two starts back and backed it up with a solid third at Casterton. Handles the undulating track well.

selections.name: Bazini
selections.reason: Disappointed last start but won beautifully at Warrnambool the run prior. Capable of bouncing back in this easier assignment.

selections.name: Raise The Note (NZ)
selections.reason: Consistent steeplechase performer who continues to improve. Expect him to be hitting the line strongly late.

danger_horse.name: Nightfall (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: A proven steeplechaser who handles wet and undulating tracks with ease.

selections.name: War No More
selections.reason: Has put together consecutive runner-up finishes on rain-affected tracks. This looks like his perfect opportunity to break through.

selections.name: Flying Shelby (NZ)
selections.reason: Solid fourth at Hamilton last start over this distance. Will appreciate the soft track conditions and rates as a key chance.

selections.name: French Court
selections.reason: Finished fifth at Ballarat Synthetic last start. Better suited back on turf and has shown enough ability to figure here.

selections.name: Gasoline Rainbow
selections.reason: Resumes from a let-up. Has shown glimpses of talent in previous preparations and could sneak into the placings.

danger_horse.name: Flying Shelby (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Consistent performer who handles the distance and rain-affected turf well.

selections.name: Aqua Storm (GB)
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten when second at Ballarat Synthetic last start. Rates highly on turf form and gets his chance to win today.

selections.name: Flying Nic
selections.reason: Disappointed on synthetic last start but has excellent soft track form, including a close second at Horsham two back.

selections.name: Back Of The Boat
selections.reason: Resumes from a let-up. Solid fifth at Seymour last start and has the tactical speed to overcome the wide draw.

selections.name: Daniel Boone (NZ)
selections.reason: Resuming after a four-month break. Has trialled well leading into this and is capable of a forward showing fresh.

danger_horse.name: Flying Nic
danger_horse.reason: Excellent wet track performer who will appreciate the return to turf.

selections.name: Matrooshi
selections.reason: Faded slightly last start but was an excellent second at Swan Hill the run prior. Rates as the class runner of the field.

selections.name: Mosquito Award
selections.reason: Consistent performer on synthetic tracks who transitions back to turf. Steven Pateman takes the ride which commands respect.

selections.name: Darts Daly
selections.reason: Solid fifth last start at Ballarat Synthetic. Gets the blinkers on today which should sharpen him up significantly.

selections.name: Royal Inference
selections.reason: Faded last start on a wet track but was a strong second at Mt Gambier prior. Capable of bouncing back.

danger_horse.name: Mosquito Award
danger_horse.reason: Highly consistent type with Steven Pateman booked to ride.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #6, Exacta Box 4,6, Trifecta 4,6 / 2,3,4,6 / ALL

selections.name: Sadlers Symphony
selections.reason: Disappointed in his last two starts but is a proven winner on heavy/soft tracks. Dean Parker rides and he can bounce back to his best.

selections.name: Smokin' Rohie
selections.reason: In excellent form with consecutive placings at Donald and Warrnambool. Handles the distance and track conditions perfectly.

selections.name: Chartwell House (IRE)
selections.reason: Disappointed last start on heavy ground but was a strong second at Mornington prior. Steven Pateman riding is a positive lead.

selections.name: Circa
selections.reason: Improved performance to finish fourth at Donald last start. Drawn well here and should get a lovely run in transit.

danger_horse.name: Smokin' Rohie
danger_horse.reason: In peak racing form with consistent placings in similar company.
